mapper.select: SELECT * FROM picture_resources WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM picture_resources WHERE site_id = #{siteId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM picture_resources WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM picture_resources WHERE script_id = #{scriptId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM picture_resources WHERE type = #{type} ORDER BY created_at DESC
